lockedMvp.note: Existing canon remains locked. This update adds the Create Brief from Link path without replacing the baseline source-text path.

featureSlice.name: Create Brief from Link
featureSlice.goal: Let an operator paste a company or source URL, generate a brief draft, review the result, and share it.

primaryPath.action: User selects link as input mode and pastes a valid URL.
User submits the URL to generate a brief.
User reviews generated brief content and metadata.
User shares or copies the resulting brief.

successStates.description: Valid-looking URL is accepted and the submit action is enabled.
Brief draft is generated from the provided link and shown in review.
User can copy or otherwise share the generated brief.

errorStates.description: Entered value is empty, malformed, or not accepted as a URL.
The system cannot retrieve or process content from the link.
The system accepts the URL but fails to produce a brief draft.
The system completes processing but returns insufficient content for a usable brief.

screens.title: Create Brief
screens.purpose: Entry screen where the user chooses input type and provides source material.
elements: Input mode selector with source-text and link options
URL input field for Create Brief from Link

screens.title: Brief Generation
screens.purpose: System processing state after user submits a valid link.
elements: Retry or return path on failure

screens.title: Review Brief
screens.purpose: User inspects generated brief before sharing.

screens.title: Share Brief
screens.purpose: User copies or sends the generated brief.
elements: Return to review or create another brief action

acceptanceCriteria.text: From the Create Brief entry screen, the user can select link input mode and see a dedicated URL input.
The create action stays disabled or blocked until the entered value is recognized as a valid-looking URL, and invalid input shows inline feedback.
Submitting a valid URL moves the user into a generation state that clearly indicates processing is underway.
When generation succeeds, the user is taken to review with a populated brief draft derived from the link.
The review screen preserves the source reference so the user can understand what link produced the brief.
From review, the user can complete the share step without re-entering the link.
If the user enters an invalid URL, the system shows a specific validation error and does not start generation.
If the link cannot be fetched or processed, the system shows an actionable error state with a retry or return path.
If processing fails after accepting the URL, the system surfaces a generation failure state distinct from invalid input.
If the link yields too little usable content, the system shows an empty-result state rather than presenting a misleadingly complete brief.

notes: This is an additive product-definition update to the locked canonical MVP flow.
The baseline source-text flow remains in scope and unchanged.
Create Brief from Link introduces a parallel entry path from the same create screen, converging back into review and share.
